content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a pull request review for "feat: Review mouse Calm3 ISO annotations". The PR adds 8 new files with mouse Calm3 calmodulin gene review content, including AI review YAML, research notes, UniProt data, GOA annotations, and cached publications.

b. **Request type**: This is a code review request. The user wants feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs/issues, performance considerations, security concerns, and test coverage.

c. **Key information**:
- PR adds 2755 lines across 8 files for mouse Calm3 gene review
- Files include structured YAML review, research notes, raw data files, and cached publications
- This appears to be part of an ISO evidence code review project
- Repository has specific guidelines in CLAUDE.md for gene review workflows

d. **Main tasks**:
- Read and analyze the added files
- Review the YAML structure against schema requirements
- Check for data quality and consistency
- Evaluate adherence to project guidelines
- Assess security and performance considerations
- Provide constructive feedback

e. **Plan of action**:
- Read CLAUDE.md to understand project-specific guidelines
- Examine the main AI review YAML file structure and content
- Review supporting files for consistency and quality
- Check for potential validation issues
- Run validation if possible (just validate mouse Calm3)
- Provide comprehensive review feedback

f. **Potential limitations**: I should be able to read files and run validation commands. May need to install dependencies first.
</analysis>

I'll analyze this pull request and provide comprehensive review feedback on the mouse Calm3 gene annotation review.

input.body: ### Reviewing PR: Mouse Calm3 ISO annotations #### Review Tasks: - [ ] Read project guidelines (CLAUDE.md) - [ ] Analyze main AI review YAML structure and content - [ ] Review supporting research and data files - [ ] Check data consistency and quality - [ ] Validate YAML against schema - [ ] Assess adherence to project standards - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23331149112)

content.text: Let me start by reading the project guidelines and then analyzing the files.
